case_title: SOL PETER VS AROSA WEST INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOL PETER AS TO DEFENDANT AROSA WEST INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO FRITZ ERNE C/O AROSA HOTELS & RESORTS INC, RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOL PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AROSA WEST INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, COURT SPOKE WI BRANCH MGR. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AROSA WEST INC.
